[Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment Preview]

A Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment will begin on 2/8 (Sat)!

💌Pick-Up Student: ★3 Meru, ★2 Momiji, ★3 Cherino, ★3 Marina
🗓️Pick-Up Recruitment Schedule: 2/8 (Sat) 2:00 ~ 2/18 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
